protocol.primary_outcome_question: How comfortable and flake-free did your skin look this morning? (0=very flaky/uncomfortable, 10=very comfortable/flake-free)
protocol.warnings: The uploaded source is anecdotal and includes routine confounders.

user_message: PitGPT can turn this into an evening routine A/B test, but the source itself is only anecdotal.
notes: Must preserve caveats about humidifier confounding.
